title: guettarda saxicola
intro: Guettarda saxicola, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Guettarda saxicola include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. Guettarda saxicola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
